name_en: Top-tier exclusive M13678 White. This Twist Slim medium handbag is presented in Epi grained calfskin for a unique texture, while the modern silhouette incorporates the iconic LV Twist lock and dazzling metal hardware. The Toron handle is adorned with the colorful Monogram pattern from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami re-edition series. 16 x 8 x 23 cm
